product_overview: Hafispace is a web-based photography studio management system that lets photographers manage clients and bookings, share Cloudinary-backed galleries, and enable clients to select photos online with quota and real-time tracking. The admin panel provides overview metrics and management pages for bookings, galleries, clients, and settings.
core_goals: Provide secure admin authentication and a protected admin dashboard for studio management
Enable creation and management of bookings, clients, and galleries (MVP CRUD)
Support gallery sharing and client photo selection with a quota system (Pickspace/Viewspace)
Surface key studio metrics on the dashboard and provide live selection updates for admins

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allow admins/clients to authenticate using username and password (NextAuth credentials); show loading and error states and redirect to admin dashboard on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign in button to submit form -> See loading state "Signing in..." while request is in progress -> Get redirected to /admin on successful login -> See dashboard overview cards

Navigate to /login -> Fill username input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Click Sign in button to submit form -> See loading state "Signing in..." while request is in progress -> See error message "Username atau password salah." -> Remain on /login

features.name: Admin Dashboard Overview
features.description: Show studio overview metrics (Active Bookings, Total Bookings, Galleries, Clients), upcoming workflows, and quick action buttons in the admin home.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View overview cards with metrics (Active Bookings, Total Bookings, Galleries, Clients) -> See loading state with "—" placeholders while data loads -> View upcoming workflows list -> Click quick action button (Create event) -> Observe quick action UI (placeholder) with no backend action

Navigate to /admin -> View overview cards attempt to load -> See loading state with "—" placeholders -> If metrics API fails, see error or persistent placeholders -> Option to retry or contact support

features.name: Bookings / Events Management
features.description: List, view and create bookings with status tracking (PENDING, CONFIRMED, COMPLETED) and show booking summary cards and table.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/events -> View summary cards (Total Bookings, Active, Pending, Completed) -> View bookings table with Client, Package, Session Date, Status, and Galleries columns -> Click "+ Create event" button to create a new booking -> Fill client field -> Fill package/ session date/ location -> Submit booking form -> See new booking in bookings table

Navigate to /admin/events -> See "Loading bookings..." while data loads -> If bookings list is empty, see "No bookings yet. Create your first booking." -> Click "+ Create event" -> Submit form with missing required fields -> See validation error messages and booking not created

features.name: Gallery Management
features.description: View galleries in a grid/table with status, photo counts, client token metadata and create or upload new galleries (Google Drive integration planned).
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/galleries -> View gallery cards in a grid layout showing gallery name, status badge, photo count, and client name -> Click New Gallery / Upload gallery -> Fill project name and (optionally) select Drive folder -> Submit create gallery -> See new gallery listed

Navigate to /admin/galleries -> See "Loading galleries..." while data loads -> If no galleries exist, see "No galleries yet. Upload a new gallery to start." -> Click "Manage" on a gallery card -> Observe that Manage button has no navigation/modal connected (UI-only) and management does not open

features.name: Client Management
features.description: List and manage clients with contact details and booking counts; provide actions to view client details and invite new clients.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/clients -> View client list with name, contact info (email/phone/instagram), booking count and join date -> Click "Add Client" or similar to create a new client -> Fill required fields (name, phone) -> Submit -> See new client appear in the list

Navigate to /admin/clients -> See "Loading clients..." while data loads -> If no clients exist, see "No clients yet. Invite your first client." -> Click "View" on a client row -> Observe that "View" button has no navigation/modal connected (UI-only) and details do not open

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: Expose settings groups for Studio Profile, Access Control, and Notifications with Configure buttons; settings storage and integrations are planned but some UI is placeholder.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/settings -> View settings groups (Studio Profile, Access Control, Notifications) -> Click "Configure" on Studio Profile -> See configuration UI appear (if implemented) or editable fields -> Save changes to persist settings
Navigate to /admin/settings -> Click "Configure" on any settings group -> Observe that Configure buttons are currently UI-only with no connected forms/backend and saving is unavailable

features.name: Admin Navigation
features.description: Provide sidebar/header navigation inside the admin panel to switch between sections and indicate the current active page.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Click navigation link "Clients" in the sidebar/header -> Navigate to /admin/clients -> See current page highlighted in navigation
Start unauthenticated -> Click navigation link "Clients" in the sidebar/header -> Be redirected to /login (protected route) or see an unauthorized state

tech_stack.other: NextAuth v5, Prisma ORM, TanStack Query, Zod, React Hook Form, bcryptjs, Lucide React

routes.description: Home/landing page with Next.js default template
Admin/client login page with username and password
Admin dashboard home with studio overview metrics
Booking/events manager page with list and status summary
Gallery manager page showing all galleries with status and photo counts
Client manager page showing all clients with contact and booking info
Settings page with studio profile, access control, and notifications

features.name: User Login
features.description: Admin/client login with username and password credentials via NextAuth
user_interactions: Fill username input field
Fill password input field
Click Sign in button to submit form
See error message "Username atau password salah." on invalid credentials
See loading state "Signing in..." while request is in progress
Get redirected to /admin on successful login

features.name: Admin Dashboard Overview
features.description: Admin home page showing key metrics - active bookings, total bookings, galleries, and clients
user_interactions: View overview cards with metrics (Active Bookings, Total Bookings, Galleries, Clients)
See loading state with "—" placeholders while data loads
View upcoming workflows list
Click quick action buttons (Create event, Upload gallery, Send invite, Review comments)

features.name: Bookings / Events Management
features.description: View and manage photography session bookings with status tracking
user_interactions: View summary cards (Total Bookings, Active, Pending, Completed)
View bookings table with Client, Package, Session Date, Status, and Galleries columns
See status badges (PENDING, CONFIRMED, COMPLETED)
Click "+ Create event" button to create a new booking
See "Loading bookings..." while data loads
See "No bookings yet. Create your first booking." when empty

features.name: Gallery Management
features.description: View and manage photo galleries for clients with token-based access
user_interactions: View gallery cards in a grid layout
See gallery name, status badge, photo count, and client name
See client token and selection count
Click "Manage" button on a gallery card
See "Loading galleries..." while data loads
See "No galleries yet. Upload a new gallery to start." when empty

features.name: Client Management
features.description: View and manage photography clients with contact info and booking history
user_interactions: View client list with name, contact info (email/phone/instagram), and booking count
See join date for each client
Click "View" button to view client details
See "Loading clients..." while data loads
See "No clients yet. Invite your first client." when empty

features.name: Admin Settings
features.description: Configure studio profile, access control, and notification preferences
user_interactions: View settings groups (Studio Profile, Access Control, Notifications)
Click "Configure" button on each settings group

features.name: Admin Navigation
features.description: Sidebar/header navigation for the admin panel
user_interactions: Click navigation links to switch between admin sections
View current page highlighted in navigation

known_limitations.issue: Quick action buttons on Admin Dashboard are UI-only placeholders with no functionality
known_limitations.impact: Clicking Create event, Upload gallery, Send invite, Review comments buttons does nothing

known_limitations.issue: Settings Configure buttons are UI-only with no connected forms or backend
known_limitations.impact: No actual settings can be saved

known_limitations.issue: Client "View" button has no navigation or modal connected
Gallery "Manage" button has no navigation or modal connected
Forgot password button has no functionality
